summary.key_theme: 公司積極推動加密貨幣抵押貸款與政治遊說以擴大業務版圖，但同時面臨加密貨幣市場波動、資安保障爭議及分析師目標價下調的壓力。

bullish.title: Coinbase: The Latest Initiatives Change Everything (Rating Upgrade)
bullish.reason: 分析師看好 Coinbase 推出加密貨幣抵押貸款與「萬能交易所」策略，認為這將顯著擴大其營收來源與市場地位。

bullish.title: Fannie Mae accepts first crypto-backed mortgage product
bullish.reason: Coinbase 與 Better Home 合作推出符合 Fannie Mae 指引的加密貨幣抵押貸款，象徵加密資產在傳統金融體系中的應用取得重大突破。

bullish.title: Coinbase (COIN) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
bullish.reason: 受市場情緒回暖與公司特定業務進展影響，Coinbase 股價在早盤交易中上漲 3.5 %。

bullish.title: Coinbase’s Political Push And Crypto Mortgages Reshape Investor Risk View
bullish.reason: 透過 Stand With Crypto 組織加強政治遊說，有助於改善監管環境，長期來看對公司營運具正面影響。

bullish.title: Coinbase’s Top Lawyer Says Prediction Markets Aren’t Gambling—and Predicts Supreme Court Will Agree
bullish.reason: 公司首席法律顧問積極為預測市場辯護，試圖降低監管風險，展現公司在法律戰場的積極態度。

bullish.title: Coinbase Rises 3%, Bitmine Jumps 4%: Is the Crypto Rally Back?
bullish.reason: 反映加密貨幣市場整體反彈，帶動 Coinbase 股價同步上漲。

bullish.title: Coinbase (COIN) Stock Up Slightly After Jim Cramer Advised Buying Bitcoin Instead
bullish.reason: 儘管 Jim Cramer 建議直接購買比特幣，但 Coinbase 作為加密生態系核心，仍受市場關注而小幅上漲。

bearish.title: Bernstein Maintains Outperform on Coinbase Global, Lowers Price Target to $330
bearish.reason: 儘管維持優於大盤評級，但 Bernstein 分析師 Gautam Chhugani 下調目標價至 330 美元，反映對未來獲利成長的保守預期。

bearish.title: Coinbase, Nebius, IREN Stocks Are Getting Hammered — And These ETFs Are Making A Fortune
bearish.reason: 受避險情緒影響，Coinbase 股價單日重挫超過 19 %，顯示市場對加密貨幣相關資產的波動性極度敏感。

bearish.title: Crypto Thefts Hit $2.7 Billion as Coinbase Coverage Limits Raise Investor Questions
bearish.reason: 加密貨幣竊盜案頻傳，投資人對 Coinbase 的帳戶保障條款與保險覆蓋範圍產生質疑，可能影響用戶信任度。

bearish.title: Crypto Insurance Sounds Great Until You Actually Need It—Here's The Ugly Truth
bearish.reason: 報導指出 Coinbase 拒絕賠付 10 萬美元比特幣損失的案例，凸顯保險條款的嚴苛與實際保障的落差。

bearish.title: Coinbase Shares Slide As Crypto Market Faces Broad Sell-Off
bearish.reason: 加密貨幣市場出現廣泛拋售，導致 Coinbase 股價在盤前交易下跌超過 3 %。

bearish.title: Trump’s Crypto Cabinet Tag Team Mortgage Payments with Fannie Mae
bearish.reason: 雖然推出抵押貸款產品，但合作夥伴 Better Home 上季虧損 4,000 萬美元，引發市場對該業務合作風險的擔憂。

bearish.title: Is Coinbase Global (COIN) Pricing In Too Much Optimism After Recent Share Price Weakness
bearish.reason: 市場質疑 Coinbase 股價是否過度反映樂觀情緒，暗示短期內可能存在估值修正壓力。

neutral.title: Coinbase Stock Bounces Around Monday: What's Happening With COIN?
neutral.reason: 股價呈現盤整狀態，投資人仍在消化近期多空交雜的消息面。

neutral.title: Nike, Beyond Meat, Coinbase, RH, And Tesla: Why These 5 Stocks Are On Investors' Radars Today
neutral.reason: 僅提及 Coinbase 為當日市場焦點個股，未提供具體利多或利空訊息。

neutral.title: These Stocks Are Today’s Movers: Nvidia, Eli Lilly, Alcoa, Coinbase, Strategy, and More
neutral.reason: 列入當日波動個股清單，主要受市場整體趨勢影響，無特定公司新聞。

neutral.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: AstraZeneca, Unity Software, Coinbase & more
neutral.reason: 盤前波動個股報導，未針對 Coinbase 業務面進行深入分析。

neutral.title: Had You Invested $1,000 in Coinbase or Robinhood IPOs, Here’s What You’d Have Today
neutral.reason: 回顧性投資績效分析，對當前股價走勢無直接影響。

neutral.title: Stocks making big moves this week: Shopify, Winnebago, Coinbase, STAAR Surgical, and Viavi Solutions
neutral.reason: 週度市場動態回顧，僅列出個股名稱，無實質影響力。
